identity.name: Lumina Stream
identity.emotional_goal: Clarity in the depths of information

headings.usage: Use 'Manrope' for all headings. Bold and tight tracking for impact.

body.usage: High legibility for summaries and chat.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-cyan-400 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(34,211,238,0.4)] transition-all duration-300 font-semibold rounded-lg px-6 py-3

inputs.search_bar: bg-slate-900/50 border-2 border-slate-800 focus:border-cyan-400 focus:ring-0 rounded-xl text-lg px-6 py-4 placeholder:text-slate-500 w-full transition-all

cards.feature: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-slate-900/40 border border-slate-800 p-8 hover:border-cyan-500/30 transition-all duration-500

video_player.wrapper: rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-2xl border border-slate-800 bg-black aspect-video relative group

images.description: Abstract digital landscape for landing page hero background
Abstract wavy lines for feature section background
Diverse team of professionals against blue backdrop
Minimalist dark workspace for 'Research Mode' feature

icons.style: Use stroke-width={1.5} for elegance. Size 20px or 24px.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Update tailwind.config.js to use the specific colors defined in 'design_system.colors'. Extend the theme, do not replace.
2. FONTS: Import Manrope, IBM Plex Sans, and JetBrains Mono in index.css.
3. LAYOUT: Implement the 'Bento Grid' for the main app dashboard (Video, Chat, Summary).
4. VISUALS: Use the glassmorphism classes for all panels (Chat, Summary, Timestamps).
5. INTERACTION: Ensure the Video Player is the focal point. When video is playing, other elements should dim slightly (Cinema Mode logic).
6. COMPONENTS: Customize Shadcn components. Remove default radius and borders, apply 'design_system.visual_enhancers.borders'.
7. STYLE: Use the provided images for the Landing Page only. The App Interface should be data-first (video + text).
8. ANIMATION: Add 'motion-safe:animate-pulse' or subtle glows to AI-generated content to signify 'intelligence'.
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
